notes: The intended contract is that create-note + focus-body each assert cursorDisturbance=none, overlayPresentation=dual-cursor-visual-only, and dualCursor=true.

Do not treat this as validated baseline truth: a hands-off replay on 2026-05-21 failed when the Notes toolbar button 新建备忘录 was not AX-pressable in the current live app state (run_1779371986165_16879_0).
Human desktop interaction invalidates evidence for this demo. Any replay where the operator switches into Notes, types, or pastes during the run must be treated as contaminated rather than promoted.
